Richer Plex metadata for the One Pace show, and the removal of cast sync — which
fundamentally can't work on an agent-less fan edit.

## Added

- **Show-level metadata** — since a fan edit has no metadata agent, the show
  itself carried none of the details Plex normally fills in. It now gets
  **genres** (Anime, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy), a **content rating**
  (TV-14), and a **studio** (Toei Animation), written as locked fields — so the
  show stops reading as "Not Rated / unknown" and shows up in Plex's genre-based
  browsing and recommendations. Applied on Full Plex sync and re-asserted once a
  day during reconcile (read-compare, so it only writes when Plex is missing it).
- **Season air dates** — each season (arc) now gets `originallyAvailableAt` set
  to its earliest episode's release date.

## Changed

- **Episode air-date drift now self-heals.** Air date joined title + summary in
  the reconcile identity, so an episode that gains a release date in the dataset
  later — or is missing one in Plex — gets it backfilled automatically instead of
  only on the initial sync. Dates that don't normalize to `YYYY-MM-DD` are ignored
  for drift so a format Plex won't echo back can't cause needless re-writes.
- **Reset cast** is retained as a cleanup tool — it removes any bare actor tags
  left on the One Pace show by earlier cast-sync attempts. It only touches One
  Pace; recover the original series in Plex with Fix Match + Clean Bundles +
  Optimize Database.

## Removed

- **Cast sync** — removed entirely (the `SYNC_CAST` / `CAST_SOURCE_SHOW` /
  `CAST_LIMIT` settings and the cast-copy step of Full Plex sync). Plex can only
  add bare, unlinked actor-name tags to an agent-less fan-edit show — no
  characters, no photos, no person-linking (that comes only from agent matching,
  which One Pace has no access to). Worse, the bare tags collide with the source
  series' real cast, breaking its cast view. There is no working path to proper
  cast on this show via the Plex API, so the feature is gone.

## Docker

```
docker pull ghcr.io/dyonng/one-pace-plex-automator:1.1.10
```
